overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a forested rural area at night. The character passes goats and a herder, then continues along a winding trail bordered by stone walls and rocky outcrops under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural path through pine forest

events.description: encounter a herd of goats and a goatherd with wooden cart along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path at night with two swords strapped to his back

notable_agents.action: goatherd standing beside a wooden cart loaded with goods on the left side of the path
herd of goats grazing and milling about on the right side of the dirt path

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel trail winding through hilly countryside
tall pine trees lining the left side of the path
tall pine trees lining the right side of the path
rocky outcrops and boulders scattered on the hillside to the right
dark blue night sky with scattered clouds and visible stars

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a wide dirt path through a pine forest at night. The rocky hillside rises on the right while tall trees frame both sides. Around the 15-second mark, a goatherd with a cart appears on the left and a herd of goats grazes on the right, creating a brief encounter in the otherwise empty trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain trail with rocky formations

events.description: low stone wall begins to appear along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the goats, moving toward rocky terrain with the stone wall emerging

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall running parallel to the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: After passing the goats, the path continues through rockier terrain. A stone wall gradually emerges on the right side around the 30-second mark, replacing the open hillside. The trail remains clear with forest trees on both sides as Geralt maintains a steady walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail bordered by stone wall

events.description: weathered wooden fence posts appear atop the stone wall on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through darker, denser forest with the stone wall and fence on the right side

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence rails and posts mounted on top of the stone wall
snow-capped or rocky mountain peaks visible in the far distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows as it enters a denser forest section. The stone wall runs prominently along the right side, and around 50 seconds a wooden fence appears atop it. The trees close in from both sides, partially obscuring the night sky, while distant mountains become visible ahead as the path continues into the darker woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that transforms from an open pine forest into a narrow, enclosed woodland trail. It begins with Geralt walking through a wide forest corridor flanked by a rocky hillside, passing a goatherd with a cart and a grazing herd of goats. As the camera moves forward, the open hillside on the right gradually gives way to a weathered stone wall that borders the path. The scene then shifts as the trail narrows and the surrounding trees close in, partially obscuring the starry night sky. Finally, a wooden fence appears atop the stone wall as the path leads deeper into the dark woods toward distant, looming mountains.
